data.title: Datadog Lifts Revenue Outlook, Analysts Still Bark About Margins
data.description: Datadog announced upbeat Q1 revenues amid exciting earnings season. Strong bookings and increased revenue guidance cited.

data.title: IBM's AI Push Takes Center Stage At Think 2025, Goldman Sees Path To Margin Growth
data.description: IBM's Think 2025 event focused on its portfolio of AI solutions for large enterprises. Analyst James Schneider maintains a Buy rating and $270 price target.

data.title: Eos Energy Stock Is Moving Higher: What's Going On?
data.description: Eos shares are trading higher Wednesday after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter financial results on Tuesday after the market closed.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines 'A Diversified Player In Epilepsy Market,' Analyst Sees Over 100% Stock Upside
data.description: Chardan initiates Praxis with a Buy rating, highlighting its epilepsy pipeline, strong cash position, and billion-dollar potential of vormatrigine.

data.title: DoorDash Misses On Q1 Sales But 2025 Order Outlook Sparks Price Target Hikes
data.description: DoorDash (DASH) stock plunges after downbeat Q1 sales announcement amid exciting earnings season. Key analysts maintain mixed ratings and price targets.
